chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1570 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6634/23 3.For hearing of main case 12-12-2023 Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate for petitioners. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G & Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a.w SIP-Muhammad Iqbal Rajput of P.S. A-section, Ghotki/I.O of case. ***** I.O present in person submits that in this case interim Challan has been submitted; however, DSP, Complaint Cell, Ghotki is making further enquiry into the matter and after the enquiry is over, final Challan would be submitted. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that DSP may be directed to conduct a transparent and honest enquiry and record version of the petitioners also. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is disposed of as not pressed. However, said DSP is directed to conduct fair and impartial enquiry and record version of both the parties and thereafter submit his report for onward submission of the Challan in the Court. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
